title: Brainbox Candy - 2 Sheets of Cheeky 'Secret Santa' Christmas Wrapping Paper - Funny Novelty Xmas Gift Wrap for Him Her Men Women Friends - Folded Quality Wrap

Environmental Considerations - Printed on FSC accredited paper sourced from sustainable sources - we love trees! 🌳
This item is designed, printed and manufactured exclusively in the UK by Brainbox Candy 🇬🇧 🇬🇧 🇬🇧
